gist.headline: Honey, I shrunk the docs
gist.blurb: We put our AI agent instructions on a diet, cutting the token count in half without losing any of the critical rules. Faster context loading, same great taste.
gist.summary: Compressed the AGENTS.md documentation by 55%, significantly reducing token count while preserving all actionable rules and critical markers.
gist.impact: AI agents and developers will experience faster context loading and less token bloat when reading the repository guidelines.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating a giant stack of paper/documents to compress them, leaving a neat, small stack behind. The bee mascot is watching happily, holding a tiny clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a massive stack of messy documents, leaving a neat, tiny stack of papers behind. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard, looking pleased. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.
